title: Camp Zama kicks off holiday season with annual tree-lighting event
description: The holidays are here! U.S. Army Garrison Japan kicked off the season with the annual tree-lighting event at Sagamihara Housing Area. Community members,...
text: The holidays are here! U.S. Army Garrison Japan kicked off the season with the annual tree-lighting event at Sagamihara Housing Area. Community members, along with Japanese guests, were there to see the 30-foot tree at SHA lit up, while also enjoying carol singing, ornament making, a parade, and a photo opportunity with Santa!
